◆ emitDebugValueComment()

bool emitDebugValueComment ( const MachineInstr * MI,
AsmPrinter & AP )
static

emitDebugValueComment - This method handles the target-independent form of DBG_VALUE, returning true if it was able to do so. A false return means the target will need to handle MI in EmitInstruction.

Definition at line 642 of file AsmPrinter.cpp.

References llvm::APFloat::convert(), llvm::APFloat::convertToDouble(), llvm::APFloat::convertToFloat(), llvm::MCStreamer::emitRawComment(), llvm::DISubprogram::getDisplayName(), llvm::TargetFrameLowering::getFrameIndexReference(), llvm::TargetSubtargetInfo::getFrameLowering(), llvm::MCRegisterInfo::getName(), llvm::DIExpression::getPieceOffset(), llvm::DIExpression::getPieceSize(), llvm::TargetSubtargetInfo::getRegisterInfo(), llvm::TargetMachine::getSubtargetImpl(), llvm::APFloat::IEEEdouble, llvm::DIExpression::isVariablePiece(), llvm::AsmPrinter::MF, Name, llvm::AsmPrinter::OutStreamer, llvm::APFloat::rmNearestTiesToEven, llvm::raw_svector_ostream::str(), and llvm::AsmPrinter::TM.

◆ getGVAlignmentLog2()

unsigned getGVAlignmentLog2 ( const GlobalValue * GV,
const DataLayout & TD,
unsigned InBits = 0 )
static

getGVAlignmentLog2 - Return the alignment to use for the specified global value in log2 form. This rounds up to the preferred alignment if possible and legal.

Definition at line 78 of file AsmPrinter.cpp.

References llvm::dyn_cast(), llvm::GlobalValue::getAlignment(), llvm::DataLayout::getPreferredAlignmentLog(), llvm::GlobalValue::hasSection(), and llvm::Log2_32().

Referenced by llvm::AsmPrinter::EmitAlignment(), and llvm::AsmPrinter::EmitGlobalVariable().

◆ isRepeatedByteSequence() [1/2]

int isRepeatedByteSequence ( const ConstantDataSequential * V)
static

isRepeatedByteSequence - Determine whether the given value is composed of a repeated sequence of identical bytes and return the byte value. If it is not a repeated sequence, return -1.

Definition at line 1693 of file AsmPrinter.cpp.

References llvm::StringRef::empty(), and llvm::StringRef::size().

Referenced by emitGlobalConstantArray(), emitGlobalConstantDataSequential(), and isRepeatedByteSequence().

isRepeatedByteSequence - Determine whether the given value is composed of a repeated sequence of identical bytes and return the byte value. If it is not a repeated sequence, return -1.
